entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `package_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `app_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `permission_type` TEXT NOT NULL, `access_time` INTEGER NOT NULL, `duration_ms` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_background` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_permission_logs_access_time` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`access_time`)

indices.name: index_permission_logs_permission_type
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_permission_logs_permission_type` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`permission_type`)
